findings.description: PascalCase class names `MessageUtil` and `MessageLevel` appear in the s1 code example (`MessageUtil.createMessage(MessageLevel.ERROR, ...)`) but are absent from the s1 hints array.
findings.source_evidence: Source action code: `throw new ApplicationException(MessageUtil.createMessage(MessageLevel.ERROR, "MSG00024", e.getMaxResultCount()));` — both class names are present in the knowledge file's own code block but not listed as hints.
